sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95508" key="smila/kinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σμῑλάκ-ῐνος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n95508.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σμῖλαξ, ξύλον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.32</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>:—also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σμῑλάκ-ειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">55</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
